news.text: Preparing MS thesis defense on VR industrial maintenance training.
Incoming PhD student in Computer Science / HCI at Colorado School of Mines.

research.title: VR Industrial Training
research.text: Immersive maintenance tasks, performance telemetry, safety violations, hesitation events, and adaptive HUD feedback.

research.title: Human-Centered AI
research.text: AI-assisted feedback generation, explanation, and state-aware support for learning environments.

research.title: Narrative Reflection Systems
research.text: D&D-inspired and spiritually informed reflection systems for meaning-making and care contexts.

projects.title: VR Hydroelectric Maintenance Trainer
projects.text: A VR system for procedural industrial maintenance training with task-state tracking and feedback.

projects.title: Source-of-Truth Analysis Pipeline
projects.text: Reusable analysis workflow for participant-level KPIs, event logs, survey scoring, and figures.

projects.title: Community Resilience ABM
projects.text: Simulation framework for prolonged disruption, social connectivity, migration, and policy allocation.

publications.title: Adaptive Feedback in VR Industrial Training Environments
Scenario-Driven VR Workforce Training with Finite-State Event Tracking
State-Aware Adaptive Feedback and Performance Telemetry in VR Industrial Maintenance Training
